name: io.github.Michael-WhiteCapData/WhiteCapData-Dev
description: Operate a k3s / Kubernetes cluster from your AI agent — safe-by-default MCP server.

environmentVariables.name: HOMELAB_MCP_CONTEXT
environmentVariables.description: kubeconfig context to use (defaults to current-context).

environmentVariables.name: HOMELAB_MCP_READONLY
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1/true to disable all mutating tools.

environmentVariables.name: HOMELAB_MCP_MUTABLE_NAMESPACES
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated namespaces mutations may touch; '*' allows all.
